skill_purpose: Provide portable repository standards, documentation of Builder vs Operator, and a scaffold CLI so new skills match skills.sh-style layout and pass agentic-skill-builder Operator checks without hand-copying fixtures.
target_audience: Authors of skills under agilebydesign-skills; agents running scaffold_skill.py; maintainers of agentic-skill-builder.
scope_out: Implementing the LangGraph builder node (stays in agentic-skill-builder)
operator_expectations: compileall scripts; build.py; scanner finds standards + scaffold script
rules_and_scanners: Optional future: bind rules/*.md to scanners when governance rules are added
